DescribeTraceMetricData.action: API name, current value is DescribeTraceMetricData
DescribeTraceMetricData.metrics: List of metric names. Available metrics: apm_requests_count (request count), apm_error_requests_count (error count), apm_requests_seconds_avg (average request latency), apm_requests_seconds_p90 (P90 latency), apm_requests_seconds_p95 (P95 latency), apm_requests_seconds_p99 (P99 latency)
DescribeTraceMetricData.metrics.name: Metric name
DescribeTraceMetricData.filters.op: Filter operator. Options: `=` - equal, `:` - equal, `!=` - not equal, `contains` - contains, `in` - in array, `>` - greater than, `>=` - greater than or equal, `<` - less than, `<=` - less than or equal
DescribeTraceMetricData.groupBy: List of group-by fields. Options: attributes.http.response.status_code (HTTP response status code)
DescribeTraceMetricData.periodSeconds: Time aggregation interval in seconds. One aggregation point is computed per periodSeconds seconds. If set to 0 or not specified, a single aggregation point is computed over the entire time range. Default: 0
DescribeTraceMetricData.aggregate: Aggregation method for returned values. Options: sum (summation), sumPerSecond (sum divided by seconds to get per-second average)
